results.title: COLUMN: Summer road trip playlist: B Artists
results.description: As the summer continues to roll on and a few more road trips are behind us, I thought I would continue sharing songs from my ultimate road trip playlist. Last month, I listed my A artists, so it only makes...

results.title: Coronation Street legend died alone and on benefits after he was sacked
results.description: Peter Adamson, who played Len Fairclough on Coronation Street for over two decades, died penniless and on benefits in 2002 after a series of catastrophic events brought his career to an end
